purpose: Native Ramadan atmosphere video — lantern, dates, iftar prep sequence.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: (Native text-to-video — no image generation step) {cultural_constraints_injection} | Motion: Ramadan atmosphere video: traditional fanous lantern slowly illuminates in foreground, warm tungsten glow gradually intensifies, table with dates and water cups becomes visible, ambient golden-hour just-after-sunset light, peaceful contemplative atmosphere, no people, no text, ambient Ramadan sound, 10 seconds
anti_patterns: Avoid trying to substitute with image-to-video fallback chain — native generation is the point
notes: Intents: all. Source code in research corpus: V01. Saudi adaptation guidance: Auto-triggered during ramadan_active. Top Ramadan content for F&B. Reference image: Not required. Recommended frequency: 1 per week during Ramadan.
